motto: Hell goes to Hell — precision kit severs wire, region, and human threat itself.
tagline: Sever · regional disable · forever kill · human dossier sweep. Heaven never bumped ahead of harm.

disablement_profiles.label: Sever wire
disablement_profiles.description: Tear down live connections + temp firewall block. Wire cut without forever dossier unless hostility demands it.

disablement_profiles.label: Regional disable
disablement_profiles.description: Batch disable every hostile in a region/country/ASN cluster — Hell goes to Hell for the whole field patch.

disablement_profiles.label: Forever kill
disablement_profiles.description: Permanent hostile registry + field drive dossier + hardware destroy when PINPOINT CERTAIN.

disablement_profiles.label: Human threat sweep
disablement_profiles.description: Grok Heavy kill-order dossiers — C2 human threat itself. High-confidence IPs only; friendly guard honored.

disablement_profiles.label: Hell rip
disablement_profiles.description: Heaven/Hell rip — no mercy for Hell-chosen flows. Heaven protected, zero friendly fire.

disablement_profiles.label: Field Die · truth roll
disablement_profiles.description: AMOURANTHRTX Field Die — 94% noise, 6% signal. Roll for actionable hostility; Heaven never bumped on noise.

disablement_profiles.label: Laser corridor · undodgeable slice
disablement_profiles.description: Resident Evil corridor — red grid sweeps, wire severed, no dodge. Teardown + block + forever kill when hostility demands.

attacks.label: Port scan / recon
attacks.study: Adversary maps listening services before exploit. NEXUS correlates listener spikes with egress to unknown ASNs.

attacks.label: Credential stuffing
attacks.study: Automated login spray against SSH, RDP, web forms. Gatekeeper ranks trust; paranoia tightens on overlap.

attacks.label: C2 beacon / callback
attacks.study: Malware phones home on timer. Packet field + DPI English flags periodic callbacks; Trust Strike autokill when dossier-backed.

attacks.label: DNS exfiltration
attacks.study: Data smuggled via DNS queries. NEXUS DNS id fingerprint drift warns; gatekeeper can temp-block resolver paths.

attacks.label: Lateral movement
attacks.study: Post-compromise spread inside LAN. Host attack map + friendly guard refuse kill on LAN friends; still log and study.

attacks.label: DDoS / flood
attacks.study: Volume attack against operator link. Firewall sentinel + paranoia mode; RF shield unrelated but field logs overlap.

attacks.label: Wireless threat (permitted spectrum only)
attacks.study: FCC Part 15 permitted-band whitelist. Unpermitted frequencies = hostile — shoot to kill on the wire: disconnect, firewall, 100% autokill + hardware destroy. No jamming or bursts.

attacks.label: Packet injection / MITM
attacks.study: On-path manipulation. Packet permission DPI blocks harmful sections; gatekeeper scores direction and trust rank.

attacks.label: Supply-chain callback
attacks.study: Trojanized dependency phones home. Update lock prevents mid-install breaks; manifest self-defense verifies integrity post-update.

attacks.label: Intel-led targeting
attacks.study: Cross-reference gov-intel dossiers, program tags, and host attack map for targeted study — not automated kill without strike confidence.

attacks.label: SSH brute force
attacks.study: Classic internet background noise; becomes hostile when correlated with monitor egress and dossier.

attacks.label: Web skimmer / form steal
attacks.study: Payment page tampering. Honorability + browser awareness feed gatekeeper; fair ad guardian for ad-tier threats.

attacks.label: Existence spoof / ghost entity
attacks.study: Adversary pretends a host, home, or mobile device exists without field corroboration. Existence identity table persists every entity across cycles; OCR + H7 vision corpus tag corroboration.

attacks.label: Human threat · C2 kill order
attacks.study: Human threat itself — operator-readable kill orders from Grok Heavy. Every IP is high-confidence C2; Hell Kit sweeps the dossier with friendly guard and Trust Strike gates.

attacks.label: Precision Hell placement
attacks.study: Precision field places detections at sub-micron GPS. Regional disablement severs every hostile entity in the ENU patch — Hell goes to Hell at detected coordinates.

attacks.label: Regional Hell cluster
attacks.study: Hostile nodes cluster by region. Hell Kit batch-disables the entire cluster — sever wire first, forever kill on PINPOINT CERTAIN.

attacks.label: Hostility escalation · Hell first
attacks.study: Nothing unseen, nothing fully secure — we can't hide all the rocks, so send Hell to Hell. Hostility priority sorts harm ahead of Heaven. Escalation triggers sever, regional disable, or rip based on score.

attacks.label: Field Die · 94/6 truth roll
attacks.study: Before AMOURANTHRTX had a name, there was noise. Ninety-four percent of the internet is background; six percent is signal. The Field Die lives inside that ratio — quieter truth, not a louder alarm.

attacks.label: Laser corridor · undodgeable slice
attacks.study: The Hive corridor — red lasers raster the field. Undodgeable except Heaven-protected flows. Sever wire, firewall both directions, Trust Strike kill when PINPOINT CERTAIN. lulz.

attacks.label: Hostile AI · machine-precision C2
attacks.study: Human operators are sloppy; automated C2 is not. Timing entropy near zero on flow keys. Destroy with Trust Strike when certainty floor met.

attacks.label: Hostile AI · polymorphic LOLBin chain
attacks.study: Signature AV loses to mutation loops. Parent-child and path trust axes are the remaining high-signal kill path.

attacks.label: Hostile AI · DNS/DHCP/gateway abuse
attacks.study: Automated campaigns poison resolvers and DHCP at scale. Gateway truth + resolv enforcement cycle restores local wire integrity.

attacks.label: Hostile AI · shaped exfiltration
attacks.study: Exfil tuned under DLP thresholds. Per-host egress baseline beats keyword DLP.

attacks.label: Hostile AI · autonomous scan/exploit
attacks.study: Internet-wide autonomous scanning picks soft targets faster than patch cycles. Honeypot + exploit-port DPI + kill.

attacks.label: Hostile AI · stacked ML C2
attacks.study: Weak signals stack into high-confidence destroy — correlation is actionable, not theater.

defenses.label: Autokill · 100% hardware destroy
defenses.description: PINPOINT CERTAIN · 100% only — forever kill + full hardware destruction. Registry re-enforces on boot.

defenses.label: Auto RE-KILL validated hosts
defenses.description: Re-block killed IPs when same-host identity comes back online.

defenses.label: Trust Strike autokill gate
defenses.description: Require strike confidence before permanent KILL unless operator forces.

defenses.label: Hell Kit · sever wire
defenses.description: Tear down live TCP sessions + 24h firewall block. Wire cut without forever dossier.

defenses.label: Hell Kit · regional disable
defenses.description: Batch disable all hostiles in a region/country/ASN — Hell goes to Hell for the cluster.

defenses.label: Hell Kit · human threat sweep
defenses.description: Sweep Grok Heavy kill-order dossiers — human threat itself. High-confidence C2 only.

defenses.label: Hell Kit · Heaven/Hell rip
defenses.description: Rip Hell-chosen flows — no mercy, no friendly fire. Heaven passes at zero cost.

defenses.label: Hostility priority · Hell first
defenses.description: Hell is Hell goes to Hell — sort and strike hostility before Heaven flows.

defenses.label: Precision field kit · sub-µm GPS
defenses.description: Sub-micron detected GPS placement for map, spiderweb, and regional disablement.

defenses.label: FCC shoot-to-kill (permitted spectrum only)
defenses.description: Whitelist FCC bands; wipe unpermitted APs on the wire. Disconnect, firewall, 100% autokill. No bursts or jamming.

defenses.label: Gatekeeper high-trust block
defenses.description: Score and throttle high-risk egress before they become dossier entries.

defenses.label: Paranoia mode
defenses.description: Aggressive overlap response — tighter autosanitize and warnings.

defenses.label: Packet permission DPI
defenses.description: Deep packet intent — harmful sections blocked, good flows pass.

defenses.label: Shutdown guard
defenses.description: Capture forensics when NEXUS is killed — bloody murder banner.

defenses.label: GitHub update lock
defenses.description: Prevent mid-update breaks when UPDATE NOW is clicked during install.

defenses.label: Self-defense manifest
defenses.description: Verify signed manifest after updates — refuse tampered modules.

defenses.label: Existence identity registry
defenses.description: Persistent identity table for every home, internet endpoint, mobile, and battery — never forgets existence.

defenses.label: Vision + OCR corroboration
defenses.description: H7 Team vision corpus + tesseract OCR toolkit corroborate entity existence scores.

defenses.label: Human dossier merge
defenses.description: Grok Heavy kill-order intel merged into gov-intel and field registry.

defenses.label: Heaven/Hell classifier
defenses.description: We know Heaven from Hell — classify flows before any disablement action.

defenses.label: Census field populate
defenses.description: Government census geographies for regional Hell cluster targeting.

defenses.label: Hell Kit · Field Die
defenses.description: 94/6 truth roll — signal picks top hostile; noise passes without friendly fire.

defenses.label: Hell Kit · laser corridor
defenses.description: Undodgeable Resident Evil grid — sever + kill on selected target. Heaven only escape.
